folio.label: 97v
folio.l: Thougú su~me men preyse it , for a sotil wyt

note.notetxt: 459Rhyming does not work in this couplet, which started on f.97r. Perhaps due to copying technique, if he copyied the first line of the folio as guideline. Also note that the colour of ink is brownODR

folio.l: To assaye a wyf , whan that it is no nede
And putten hire , in angwyssú and in drede
¢ For whicú this Markys , wrougút in this manere
He cam a nygút a lone , there as she lay
Witú sterne face , and witú ful trouble cheere
And seide thus , Grisilde q¶ he , that day
That I ©ow toke , out of ©oure poore array
And putte ©ow in estat , of heigú noblesse
ñe han it nat forgeten , as I gesse
¢ I seye Grisilde , this present dignitee
In whicú that I haue put ©ow , as I trowe
Maketú ©ow nat , forgeteful for to be
That I ©ow toke , in poore estat , ful lowe
For any wele , ©e mot ©oure seluen knowe
Take hede , of euäy word , that I ©ow seye
There nys no wygút , that heritú it but we tweye
¢ ñe wot ©oure self wel , how that ©e cam heere
In to this hous , it is nat longe a goo
And thougú to me , that ©e be leef and deere
Vn to my gentiles , ©e be no thyngö soo
They seyn to hem , it is gret shame and woo
For to be suggettes , and ben in seruage
To the , that born art , of a smal lynage
¢ And namely , sithe thy dougúter was I bore
Theise wordes han they spoken , doutelees
But I desire , as I haue don byfore
To lyue my lif witú hem , in reste and pees
I may nat in this caas , be rechelees
I mot don witú thy dougúter , for the beste
Nat as I wolde , but as myne gentiles liste
¢ And ©et god wot , this is ful lotú to me
But nathelees , witú outen ©oure wetynge
I wyl nat don , but this wol I q¶ he
That ©e to me assenten , as in this thynge
Shewe now ©oure pacience , in ©oure werkynge
That ©e me higút , and swor in ©oure village
That day that maked was , oure mariage
¢ Whan she had herd al this , she nougút a meeued
Neither in word , chere ne countenaunce
For as it semed , she was nougút a greued
She seide lord , al litú in ©oure plesaunce
My child and I , witú hertly obeysaunce
Ben ©oures alle , and ©e moun~ or or saue or spille
ñoure owen thyngö , werketú after ©oure wylle
